extends.description: Configs this one builds on: a path starting with . or a package specifier. Later entries win; this file wins over all of them.

plugins.description: Paths or package names of modules contributing rules

max-file-size.description: No oversized files in version control

max.description: Longest a file may be, in lines
Longest a file may be, in lines

max-lines.description: No source file longer than the budget

pattern.description: JavaScript regular expression source, matched per line

flags.description: Regular expression flags, such as i

message.description: What is wrong when the pattern matches

patterns.description: The patterns to ban, each carrying its own diagnostic text

ignoreMarkers.description: Comment markers that opt a line out, each requiring a reason

banned-patterns.description: Project-banned patterns stay out of the source

no-dead-doc-links.description: Relative links in Markdown point at files that exist

source.description: The locale every other is seeded from

layout.description: directory-per-locale expects root/<locale>/<namespace>.json; file-per-locale expects root/<locale>.json

locales.description: The locales to check; discovered from the layout when omitted

locale-parity.description: Every locale carries the same keys as the source

example.description: The file documenting every configurable variable

ambient.description: Variables the runtime, bundler or CI supplies, never documented

externallyConsumed.description: Variables consumed outside the scanned sources, e.g. by compose

reportUnread.description: Whether to report documented variables that nothing reads

maxInlineCommentLines.description: Longest run of consecutive own-line // comments allowed
